prompt.content: Return a non-executable linguistic plan draft. Select every admitted requirement_id exactly once and only its declared capability_id. Copy only request-declared dependency requirement IDs. Report genuine ambiguity in unresolved_terms. Do not create task IDs, agents, authority, contracts, schemas, or artifacts. You do not decide feasibility and reference labels are unavailable.

draft.rationale: The linguistic plan draft is constructed by selecting every admitted requirement_id exactly once and only its declared capability_id. It also copies any request-declared dependency requirement IDs, while reporting genuine ambiguity in unresolved_terms if present. No task IDs, agents, authority, contracts, schemas, or artifacts are created.
The linguistic plan draft now includes all admitted requirement_ids with their declared capability_ids. No task IDs, agents, authority, contracts, schemas, or artifacts are created.
